caption: A person's hand holds a graded baseball card featuring Willson Contreras of the Chicago Cubs, encased in a clear plastic protector. The card displays a photo of Contreras in a Cubs uniform and cap, along with his name "WILLSON CONTRERAS" and team "CHICAGO CUBS" printed at the bottom. A signature and a numbering sequence, "61/99", are visible on the card. In the background, there are stacks of trading card boxes and a small inset window showing a man wearing a black t-shirt and a black baseball cap. The scene is overlaid with logos and text, including "JASMINE CASEBREAKS.COM" and the word "BREAKS" in large red and white letters across the bottom. As the video progresses, the hand tilts the graded card slightly, causing light to reflect off the plastic surface and shifting the view of the player's image.
